entities.name: SPATIAL REFERENCE SYSTEM DATABASE
entities.description: A database developed to provide spatial references for field crop plots

entities.name: FIELD CROP PLOT BOUNDARIES
entities.description: The boundaries of individual crop plots extracted from high-resolution images

entities.name: HIGH-RESOLUTION IMAGES
entities.description: Images with spatial resolution less than 2.5 m used for plot extraction

entities.name: SATELLITES
entities.description: Sources of high-resolution images such as Cartosat and QuickBird

entities.name: VILLAGE MAPS
entities.description: Maps of villages used along with survey numbers for geo-referencing

entities.name: SURVEY NUMBERS
entities.description: Identification numbers for land parcels used in geo-referencing

entities.name: GEO-REFERENCING
entities.description: The process of assigning real-world coordinates to map features

entities.name: CONTROL POINTS
entities.description: Natural features or roads used to increase positional accuracy during geo-referencing

entities.name: DGPS
entities.description: Differential Global Positioning System used to increase positional accuracy

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH
entities.description: Source of high-resolution natural color composite images for crop plot extraction

entities.name: GIS ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Geographic Information System environment used to develop controlled mosaics of crop plots

entities.name: GEO-FENCED MAP TILE
entities.description: A map tile converted from a GIS mosaic and loaded onto a smartphone

entities.name: SMARTPHONE
entities.description: Device used for automatic navigation and recording field information

entities.name: AUTOMATIC NAVIGATION
entities.description: A feature of the smartphone application for navigating to crop plots

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Individuals who cooperated in the mapping process and used the reference data

entities.name: FIELD INVENTORY
entities.description: The process of recording crop plot information in the field

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The winter cropping season during which the field inventory was conducted

entities.name: ANDROID APPLICATION
entities.description: Software modified to reduce mapping of plots without crops

entities.name: QGIS
entities.description: Software used for the systematic organization, visualization, and spatial analysis of generated data

entities.name: VISUALIZATION
entities.description: The process of representing spatial data visually using QGIS

entities.name: SPATIAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing spatial data using QGIS
